name: BRONCHOPULMONARY DYSPLASIA
definition: RESPIRATOR LUNG = BPD complication of respirator therapy (PPV or nasal CPAP) treated with > 21% oxygen for > 28

demographics.Path: loss of ciliated cells + necrosis of bronchiolar mucosa

discriminating_features: RDS pattern of hyaline membrane disease
small round cystic lucencies alternating with regions of irregular opacity
"spongy" / "bubbly" coarse linear densities, esp. in upper lobes

general: RDS pattern of hyaline membrane disease
small round cystic lucencies alternating with regions of irregular opacity
"spongy" / "bubbly" coarse linear densities, esp. in upper lobes

clinical.Prognosis: 40% mortality if not resolved by 1 month
clinical.Cx: (1)  Increased airway reactivity = increased frequency of lower respiratory tract
